message:
feat(tui): Add HTML export modal to detail view

Adds an interactive export modal accessible from the detail view with 'e' key.
The modal allows users to configure and export search results to HTML format
with customizable options.

Changes:
- Add export modal state tracking (show_export_modal, export_modal_state)
- Import ExportModalState and render_export_modal from components
- Handle keyboard navigation (Tab, Esc, Space) within modal
- Integrate modal rendering into the TUI draw loop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
